prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科最低位次分别为5586→4848→4102→4332→6779名，2025年位次大幅后移约2447名，创近五年新低，主要受专业组拆分及扩招影响；该校在河南省理科招生计划持续扩增：2021年119人、2022年119人、2023年129人、2024年133人、2025年134人，2026年大幅扩招至216人，较2025年增长约61%，扩招幅度显著，将直接拉低录取位次。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中山大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第13名，稳居全国顶尖高校行列，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面（涉及学术不端事件），但抖音热度为较热（总排名第29），关注度较高；2022年曾出现多省断档，2025年广东考生报考热情有所降温，但整体仍属热门院校；拥有23个A-及以上学科，包括工商管理A+、生态学A+、临床医学A-、计算机科学与技术A-、数学A等，学科实力雄厚，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、临床医学等中山大学优势专业均为高热推荐专业；河南省2026年高考总人数约120万（较2025年增长约32%），竞争进一步加剧；中山大学位于广东广州，属于华南地区顶尖高校，对河南考生有较强跨省吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移、2026年计划扩招61%、考生总数增加约32%以及学校顶尖层次和优势学科的强吸引力，预计2026年理科最低录取位次将继续后移但幅度。预测最低位次约9068名，区间8568–9568名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science students were 5586 → 4848 → 4102 → 4332 → 6779 respectively. In 2025, the ranking significantly dropped by about 2447 places, hitting a five-year low, mainly due to the splitting of major groups and enrollment expansion. The university's science enrollment plan in Henan Province has been continuously expanding: 119 in 2021, 119 in 2022, 129 in 2023, 133 in 2024, 134 in 2025, and a substantial expansion to 216 in 2026, an increase of about 61% compared to 2025. This significant expansion will directly lower admission rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sun Yat-sen University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 13th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top universities in the country, strongly attracting high-scoring students. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving academic misconduct incidents), but its Douyin popularity is relatively high (29th overall), with considerable attention. In 2022, there were gaps in admissions across multiple provinces, and in 2025, the enthusiasm of Guangdong candidates cooled somewhat, but overall it remains a popular institution. It has 23 A- or above disciplines, including Business Administration A+, Ecology A+, Clinical Medicine A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Mathematics A, etc., with strong academic strength, attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, Clinical Medicine, and other advantageous majors at Sun Yat-sen University are all highly recommended popular majors. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Henan Province college entrance exam is about 1.2 million (an increase of about 32% compared to 2025), intensifying competition. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a top university in South China, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Henan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant drop in rankings in 2025, the 61% enrollment expansion plan for 2026, the approximately 32% increase in the total number of candidates, and the strong appeal of the university's top-tier level and advantageous disciplines, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for science students in 2026 will continue to drop but at a moderated pace. The predicted minimum ranking is about 9068, with a range of 8568–9568.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 8568-9568, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program, Computer Science) as reach targets, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 8500), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors. Sun Yat-sen University's medical and computer science fields are outstanding; choose based on your interests and career plans.
